title: Pre-op cardiac risk documentation anesthesia
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Supports documenting clinician-led cardiovascular disease and risk-factor review, use of an already completed validated risk assessment, selective testing decisions, and team-based discussion.
investigations.rationale: The exact ACC key points support documenting a clinician-led stepwise cardiovascular risk review, selected existing tests, and team discussion without generating a risk score or testing recommendation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting clinician-led cardiovascular disease and risk-factor review, use of an already completed validated risk assessment, selective testing decisions, and team-based discussion.

source.title: 2024 AHA/ACC Perioperative CV Management Guideline: Key Points

exact_section.heading: Key points 1-4 - stepwise cardiovascular assessment, selective testing, and team care

source_limitations: Specific cardiovascular condition, surgery and urgency, functional capacity, validated score inputs and result, ECG, biomarkers, imaging, stress testing, unstable disease, multidisciplinary decision, and final perioperative plan remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
